topStories.description: Police report there were no injuries after someone fired a gun at the US consulate in the early morning hours.

topStories.title: Canada police investigate after shots fired at US consulate in Toronto
topStories.description: It comes as Norwegian police investigate an explosion that occurred outside the US embassy in Oslo on Sunday.

topStories.title: Watch: U.S-Israeli-Iran war: Why oil prices are suddenly surging worldwide| Explained
topStories.description: The war between the United States, Israel and Iran is beginning to shake global energy markets. After air strikes on Iran, Tehran responded with missile attacks and announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz — one of the world’s most critical oil shipping routes.

topStories.title: IEA due to meet as member states mull releasing oil reserves amid Iran war
topStories.description: International Energy Agency chief says talks aim to assess conditions as US-Israel war on Iran fuels global uncertainty.

topStories.title: Majority Of Americans Oppose Iran War, 77% Fear Terror Attack On US Soil: Poll
topStories.description: The poll has revealed that the majority of the voters do not want to see US Army boots on Iranian soil, but do not see an immediate end to the conflict.

topStories.title: US general says he ‘respects’ Iran’s fight
topStories.description: The chairman of the US Joint Chiefs of Staff said he “respects” Iran’s resistance in the war.

topStories.title: Putin Coughs Repeatedly In Leaked Video, Sparks Speculation About His Heath
topStories.description: The Russian president was recording a tribute to women on March 8 when he began coughing and spluttering, forcing him to halt the speech.

topStories.title: Iran fires back at Trump over threats to new Supreme Leader: ‘Be careful not to be eliminated’
topStories.description: Iran has warned Trump after he threatened severe consequences if Tehran disrupts oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. Trump also claimed the country’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, would not be able to “live in peace.”

topStories.title: Amazon Wins US Court Order Blocking Perplexity's AI Shopping Bots
topStories.description: Amazon in November filed a lawsuit against the artificial intelligence startup accusing Perplexity of committing computer fraud by failing to disclose when Comet is shopping on a real person's behalf,...

topStories.title: US-Israel-Iran war: Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth warns Tuesday will be ‘most intense day of strikes’
topStories.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said Tuesday would be the most intense day yet of US strikes inside Iran as the conflict entered its 11th day. Israel’s PM vowed to topple Iran’s regime, while Tehran named Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and warned Donald Trump against escalating threats.

dailyNews.title: UK sends warship HMS Dragon to Eastern Mediterranean after Cyprus drone attack
dailyNews.description: Britain has deployed the Royal Navy destroyer HMS Dragon to the eastern Mediterranean more than a week after a drone struck its RAF Akrotiri base in Cyprus, an attack linked to escalating tensions following US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Committed to protecting the Aravalli hills, says  Bhupender Yadav
dailyNews.description: Minister said that the government is considering the setting up of a High Powered Committee on the matter, as directed by the Supreme Court

Israel’s PM vowed to topple Iran’s regime, while Tehran named Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and warned Donald Trump against escalating threats.

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth vows ‘most intense day’ of US strikes against Iran
dailyNews.description: Pete Hegseth says Donald Trump controls the pace of the war, but acknowledges that Israel has its own objectives.

dailyNews.title: US defence chief ends Iran war briefing with prayer for troops
dailyNews.description: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth recited a prayer for US troops attacking Iran, asking for strength and protection.

dailyNews.title: Legora reaches $5.55 billion valuation as AI legal tech boom endures
dailyNews.description: Legora, an AI platform for lawyers, is now valued at $5.55 billion following a $550 million Series D led by Accel to fuel its growth in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Is architecture a portrait of society?
dailyNews.description: What does our architecture say about us?

dailyNews.title: From remote work to fuel rationing: How Asian countries are managing energy shortages amid US-Israel-Iran war
dailyNews.description: Asian nations such as Pakistan, Thailand and Vietnam are implementing measures to address economic instability caused by energy supply disruptions amid the Middle East conflict. This includes spending cuts, encouraging remote work and energy conservation efforts.

dailyNews.title: Poll shows majority of Americans oppose attack on Iran, 77% fear terror attack on US soil in retaliation
dailyNews.description: A majority of American voters do not support sending ground troops into Iran, but they also do not expect the conflict to end quickly. While most do not support US attack on Iran, many fear a terror attack on US soil in retaliation

dailyNews.title: ‘Muslims don’t belong in American society’: Republican Rep. Ogles pushes ban on immigration from Muslim-majority nations
dailyNews.description: Ogles announced plans to introduce legislation that would halt immigration from several countries with predominantly Muslim populations.

dailyNews.title: Gunshots reported outside US consulate in Toronto, Canada; police probing incident
dailyNews.description: Police in Canada are investigating after gunshots were reported at the US consulate in Toronto, though no injuries were reported. The incident comes days after a suspected improvised explosive device damaged the US embassy entrance in Oslo, Norway, where police are still searching for the suspect.

dailyNews.title: 'I just want to be able to sleep': Attacks in Iran rock cities and cut power
dailyNews.description: Iranians in Tehran and Karaj tell the BBC they are exhausted and struggling to sleep after 10 days of Israeli and US attacks.
